query: Find 10 buildings in Kristiansand municipality that intersect both 200-year storm-surge areas and 200-year flood zones, sorted by bygningid ascending.

2.description: get buildings in the municipality (bygningid and representasjonspunkt)

3.description: get 200-year storm-surge polygons reduced to municipality extent

4.description: get 200-year flood polygons reduced to municipality extent

5.description: find buildings that intersect storm-surge polygons

6.description: from those, find buildings that also intersect flood polygons

7.description: deduplicate to one row per building

executions.sql: SELECT kommunenummer, omrade FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune WHERE kommunenavn ILIKE '%kristiansand%' AND gyldigtil IS NULL LIMIT 1;
SELECT bygningid, representasjonspunkt FROM matrikkelenbygning_fe504ac373564e10b85865ef2a507c63.bygning WHERE kommunenummer = '4204';
